name: Sakai Moving Service Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sakai Moving Service Co.,Ltd. provides moving transportation services in Japan. It also offers moving incidental services. The company was formerly known as Sakai Hikkoshi Center and changed its name to Sakai Moving Service Co.,Ltd. in October 1990. Sakai Moving Service Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1956 and is headquartered in Sakai, Japan.
